description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“AV”), operating in supervised autonomous mode, was traveling northbound in an alleyway between 26th 
Street and Princeton Street. As the AV approached the intersection with another alleyway, a Mitsubishi Outlander traveling westbound on a 
perpendicular alleyway entered the intersection. In response, the Cruise AV operator disengaged from autonomous into manual mode and 
braked, but shortly thereafter, the AV made contact with the Mitsubishi Outlander, damaging the AV’s front passenger side bumper fascia. 
The parties exchanged information and there were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
